title: Police and Forensics Teams Swarm Planes at Glasgow Airport

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Police and Forensics Teams Swarm Planes at Glasgow Airport. Police and forensic teams investigate two aircraft at Glasgow Airport on 2 February 2026, with no disruption to flights or passenger safety.
